# kIOUserStorageOptionNone

**Macro**

A value that defines no options.

## Declaration

```swift
#define kIOUserStorageOptionNone
```

## Discussion

This value equals `0x0000`.

## Storage Options

- **kIOUserStorageOptionForceUnitAccess**: An option to use Force Unit Access (FUA).
